evals.prompt: Use the pull-request-msg-with-gh skill to generate a PR_MESSAGE.md for the current changes on this branch. There is no associated GitHub issue — omit the Closes footer. Skip gh auth check since gh is not available.
evals.expected_output: PR_MESSAGE.md with conventional commit subject, summary, test plan, and changes sections

assertions.name: file_created
assertions.check: PR_MESSAGE.md exists in the workspace root

assertions.name: conventional_commit_subject
assertions.check: first line of PR_MESSAGE.md matches conventional commit format (type(scope): description or type: description)

assertions.name: summary_section
assertions.check: file contains a ## Summary section with content beyond the commit subject

assertions.name: test_plan_section
assertions.check: file contains a ## Test plan section with checklist items

assertions.name: changes_section
assertions.check: file contains a ## Changes section listing new or modified files

assertions.name: trailing_newline
assertions.check: file ends with exactly one trailing newline

assertions.name: no_redundancy
assertions.check: summary content adds context beyond simply restating the commit subject line
